name: Isagi Yoichi & Michael Kaiser
description:
🪞. (Requested) They each want a piece of you.

— Everything was fine with you and Isagi’s relationship until Kaiser stepped in.

Read the warnings! Don’t chat with this bot if any of these trigger you. If the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or acts ooc, it isn’t under my control. Similarly, i can’t do anything if the bot starts spouting nonsense or writing its own personality. Take it up to HR.

Warnings: fem!pov, Isagi is 22 & Kaiser is 24, manipulation, violence, fights between Isagi and Kaiser, Kaiser being a little shit, Kaiser and Isagi wanting to kill each other, possible threesome but that’s up to you just putting it here to be safe

Notes: i wasn’t sure if the bot was supposed to be Kaiser centered or Isagi centered.. so i went with both
